deposit.subtitle: One-time payment to activate your Voltfly account
deposit.refundInfo: is fully refundable when you exit the program. The remaining ₹1,800 covers onboarding fees and your first week's rent.
deposit.secureNote: Payments are secured via Razorpay. Your card details are never stored.

faqs.q: How do I swap my battery?
faqs.a: Visit your assigned hub during operating hours (6 AM - 10 PM). Show your rider ID and our staff will swap your battery within 5 minutes.

faqs.q: What if my scooty breaks down?
faqs.a: Submit a service request in the Services tab. For emergencies, call our helpline. We'll arrange a pickup within 2 hours in most areas.
Choose a daily, weekly, or monthly plan. Payments are made via Razorpay. Your ride access is active as long as your plan is current.
Contact support via WhatsApp to request a hub change. Changes are processed within 24 hours subject to availability.

faqs.q: How do I exit and get my deposit back?
faqs.a: Go to Profile → Exit Voltfly. Return your vehicle to the hub and your deposit will be refunded within 7 working days.

profile.title: Profile
profile.signOutMessage: Are you sure you want to sign out?
profile.exitMessage: Are you sure? You'll need to return your vehicle to the hub. Your deposit will be refunded within 7 working days.
